interfaces.name: getHomePageHighlights
interfaces.description: Get featured events and beginner articles for the homepage hero sections.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options and ranges for the Events & Programs page.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search and filter events for the Events & Programs listing.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Optional text search across title and description.

interfaces.name: getEventDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific event or webinar.

interfaces.name: bookmarkEvent
interfaces.description: Bookmark or save an event to My Events / dashboard.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Register for an event or webinar and optionally add it to the dashboard.

parameters.name: add_to_dashboard
parameters.description: Whether to add this registration to My Events.

interfaces.name: getMyEventsOverview
interfaces.description: Get a combined view of bookmarked and registered events for the dashboard.

interfaces.name: getActionFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters and ranges for the action library in the Action Planner.

interfaces.name: searchActions
interfaces.description: Search and filter conservation actions that can be added to the current plan.

interfaces.name: addActionToActiveActionPlan
interfaces.description: Add an action to the user's active action plan, creating a plan if needed.

interfaces.name: removeActionFromActiveActionPlan
interfaces.description: Remove an action from the active action plan if present.

interfaces.name: getActiveActionPlanOverview
interfaces.description: Get the current action plan overview with all actions and summary metrics.

interfaces.name: saveActiveActionPlan
interfaces.description: Save or update the active action plan's name and description.

interfaces.name: calculateCarbonFootprint
interfaces.description: Calculate a baseline annual carbon footprint for a household and create a CarbonAssessment record.

interfaces.name: setCarbonReductionGoalForLatestAssessment
interfaces.description: Create and save a carbon reduction goal based on the most recent assessment.

interfaces.name: getCarbonCalculatorSummary
interfaces.description: Get the latest carbon assessment and any active reduction goal for the dashboard and calculator.

interfaces.name: getConservationProjectFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for Conservation Projects / Donate page.

interfaces.name: searchConservationProjects
interfaces.description: Search and filter conservation projects that can receive pledges.

interfaces.name: getConservationProjectDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a conservation project.

interfaces.name: createDonationPledge
interfaces.description: Create a one-time or recurring donation pledge for a project.

interfaces.name: getActiveDonationPledgesSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of active donation pledges for the dashboard.

interfaces.name: getArticleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Articles & Guides listing.

interfaces.name: searchArticles
interfaces.description: Search and filter articles and guides.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetails
interfaces.description: Get the full content and metadata for an article.

interfaces.name: bookmarkArticle
interfaces.description: Bookmark an article for later reading.

interfaces.name: getBookmarkedArticles
interfaces.description: Get all bookmarked articles to support building reading lists.

interfaces.name: createReadingList
interfaces.description: Create a new named reading list.

interfaces.name: updateReadingList
interfaces.description: Rename or update a reading list's description.

interfaces.name: deleteReadingList
interfaces.description: Delete a reading list and its item associations.

interfaces.name: addArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add an article to a specific reading list.

interfaces.name: removeArticleFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove an article from a reading list.

interfaces.name: getMyReadingListsOverview
interfaces.description: Get all reading lists with counts for the My Reading Lists page.

interfaces.name: getReadingListDetails
interfaces.description: Get details and articles for a specific reading list.

interfaces.name: getVolunteerGroupFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for volunteer groups on the Volunteer & Groups page.

interfaces.name: searchVolunteerGroups
interfaces.description: Search and filter ongoing volunteer groups.

interfaces.name: getVolunteerGroupDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a volunteer group.

interfaces.name: joinVolunteerGroup
interfaces.description: Join a volunteer group and create a membership record.

interfaces.name: updateGroupMembershipPreferences
interfaces.description: Update participation frequency and notes for a group membership.

interfaces.name: getVolunteerMembershipsSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of volunteer group memberships for the dashboard.

interfaces.name: getLifestyleQuizIntro
interfaces.description: Get high-level info about the lifestyle quiz sections and estimated time.

interfaces.name: startLifestyleQuiz
interfaces.description: Start a lifestyle quiz session and return all questions and options.

interfaces.name: submitLifestyleQuizAnswers
interfaces.description: Submit answers for the current lifestyle quiz and get a results summary plus initial recommendations.

interfaces.name: getQuizRecommendedChallenges
interfaces.description: Get recommended challenges from the latest completed quiz with optional server-side filtering.

interfaces.name: activateChallengeFromQuiz
interfaces.description: Activate a recommended challenge with its default frequency, marking it as from quiz recommendations.

interfaces.name: getMyChallengesOverview
interfaces.description: Get all activated challenges for the My Challenges section of the dashboard.

interfaces.name: setActivatedChallengeFrequency
interfaces.description: Update the frequency of an activated challenge (e.g., to daily).

interfaces.name: updateActivatedChallengeStatus
interfaces.description: Update the status of an activated challenge (e.g., pause or complete).

interfaces.name: getDashboardOverview
interfaces.description: Get a consolidated overview for the My Dashboard page, including challenges, events, plans, carbon goals, pledges, and reading lists.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get mission, vision, and focus area content for the About page.

interfaces.name: getContactPageInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact form configuration and alternative contact details.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a contact form message.

interfaces.name: getFaqEntries
interfaces.description: Get FAQ entries grouped by category for the FAQ page.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get the full privacy policy content.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateActiveActionPlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the single active ActionPlan for the current user context.

helperFunctions.name: _getLatestCarbonAssessment
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch the most recent CarbonAssessment for the current user context.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateQuizSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create or retrieve the in-progress QuizSession without exposing a session id.

helperFunctions.name: _getUserStateStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to access the single-user state store (e.g., local storage or in-memory) for saved items and preferences.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateDistanceMiles
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate distance in miles between a reference location (e.g., ZIP centroid) and entity coordinates.

helperFunctions.name: _buildDashboardSnapshot
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to aggregate data from multiple domains into a single dashboard overview payload.
